code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut result = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  mut nb = b
  if b >= 65 and b <= 90
    nb = 65 + (b - 65 + 13) % 26
  else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
    nb = 97 + (b - 97 + 13) % 26
  end
  result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(nb)}"
  i = i + 1
end
println(result)
